title: inbox.reclassify
description: Write manual frame_type overrides for one or more files in an Inbox item. Bulk multiselect is supported — supply multiple entries in a single request. After writing overrides, the classifier re-runs aggregation on the folder with overrides included as authoritative evidence. Once all files are either classified or overridden, the item transitions to single_type or mixed and the normal inbox.confirm action becomes available. (Ref: R-Unclass-1, R-Unclass-2)

inboxItemId.description: Stable identifier of the Inbox item whose files are being reclassified.

overrides.description: One entry per file being reclassified. Supports bulk assignment by providing multiple entries.

filePath.description: Relative file path as stored in InboxClassificationEvidence.relativeFilePath.

frameType.description: The frame type to assign to this file via manualOverride.

updatedType.description: The folder classification result after re-aggregation with the new overrides applied.

remainingUnclassified.description: Count of files still needing review (unclassified = true AND manualOverride IS NULL). Zero means the item is ready for inbox.confirm.

appliedCount.description: Number of file overrides successfully written in this request.

errors.description: No InboxItem exists for the provided inboxItemId.
The Inbox item already has an open Plan. Reclassification is not permitted while a plan is open.
One or more filePath values in overrides do not match any InboxClassificationEvidence row for this item.
